name: Spark Plug
description: Shared your first Spark! You've officially joined the arsonist's club. The good kind.

name: Human Tesla Coil
description: Shared 5 Sparks. Generating ideas at an alarming rate.

name: The Kingmaker
description: You voted on 10 Sparks. How's it feel to choose what ideas live or die?

name: Serial Clicker
description: Logged in 3 times. You just can't stay away, can you?

name: Department Pioneer
description: You shared 3 Sparks. Your ideas are shaping the future of Apex.

name: Opinionated Citizen
description: You voted for the first time! Way to exercise your digital democracy.

name: Democracy Manifest
description: 50 votes recorded. You're basically a one-person town council at this point.

name: Idea Archmage
description: 10 Sparks shared. Your brain is a particle accelerator for town improvements.

name: Resident Regular
description: 10 logins. You're here so often we should charge you rent.

name: The Ghost in the Machine
description: 50 logins. You live here now. Hope you like the digital walls.
